Recent predict.py variants give 80.02-80.08%. Time left: ~8 min. Analysis: Need to check all checkpoint metadata to find the actual best model, and potentially ensemble multiple checkpoints for better accuracy. Also try bicubic interpolation for better 32x32→224 upscaling. Decision: Quick check all checkpoints, then update predict.py with best strategy and submit.
